title: FINANCE, INSURANCE, AND STUDENT LOAN COMPLAINTS - 211info
text: DIVISION OF FINANCIAL REGULATION FINANCE, INSURANCE, AND STUDENT LOAN COMPLAINTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Fields complaints from individuals experiencing problems with a company or individual offering services in the finance or insurance industries. Examples of financial services include payday and title loans, consumer loans, student loans, mortgages, pawns, check cashing, investments, money transmission, and pre-need funeral trusts. Also provides a tool to report issues with state banks and credit unions, as well as data breaches. 350 Winter Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (888) 877-4894 ... Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Consumer Hotline (888) 877-4894 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, email, or call for more information or to file a complaint. Online complaint forms available. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Bank/Savings and Loans Complaints Bank/Savings and Loans Complaints * Student Financial Aid Issues Check Seller/Casher Complaints Credit Union Complaints Finance Company Complaints Insurance Complaints Investment Counselor/Firm Complaints Mortgage Company Complaints Pawnbroker Complaints Other Services Offered At This Location: MONEY MANAGEMENT - BANK ON OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT - CONSUMER FINANCIAL SERVICES INFORMATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DIVISION OF FINANCIAL REGULATION
